# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: user-route
        paths:
          - /users
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              second: 5
              limit_by: consumer
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - '*'
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - DELETE

  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8081
    routes:
      - name: order-route
        paths:
          - /orders
        plugins:
          - name: request-size-limiting
            config:
              allowed_payload_size: 1048576  # 1 MB

  - name: product-service
    url: http://product-service:8082
    routes:
      - name: product-route
        paths:
          - /products
        plugins:
          - name: jwt
            config:
              secret: secret_key
              algorithms:
                - HS256

  - name: payments-service
    url: http://payments-service:8083
    routes:
      - name: payment-route
        paths:
          - /payments
        plugins:
          - name: basic-auth
            config:
              hide_credentials: true

  - name: inventory-service
    url: http://inventory-service:8084
    routes:
      - name: inventory-route
        paths:
          - /inventory
        plugins:
          - name: response-transformer
            config:
              add:
                - x-custom-header: "Custom Value"

plugins:
  - name: request-termination
    config:
      status_code: 404
      message: "Not Found"
